sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 10:00:00.123456'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 11:30:00.654321');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-05 15:00:00.000000' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-10-03 00:00:00.000000';
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-04 00:00:00.000000';
